name: @gcu/webmcp
description: Zero-dependency WebMCP bridge: connect Claude Code / Claude Desktop (or any MCP stdio client) to GCU browser surfaces — over a localhost socket, or a shared folder (fs transport: no port, no extension). Runs on node, bun, or deno.
author: Arthur Endlein Correia

scripts.smoke: node tools/smoke.mjs && node tools/smoke-fs.mjs && node tools/smoke-fs-bridge.mjs && node tools/smoke-fs-watch.mjs
scripts.smoke:fs: node tools/smoke-fs.mjs && node tools/smoke-fs-bridge.mjs && node tools/smoke-fs-watch.mjs
